title: LlamaCppRuntime streaming generate + sampling params + cancellation
goal: Implement the generate() path for LlamaCppRuntime: streaming TokenStream via llama-cpp-2 sample-and-decode loop, sampling params honoured (temperature/top_p/top_k/min_p/repetition_penalty/seed), structured-decoding stub, cancellation token mid-stream, stop sequences.
expected_diff_shape: New src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_runtime/llama_cpp/generate.rs + sampler.rs; adapter.rs generate() implementation; tests exercising streaming + cancel + stop sequences (env-var-gated).
implementation_notes: Per AC-LLAMACPP-ADAPTER + AC-INFER-LAB-8-TECHNIQUES: streaming generate is the default surface. Implement as `async fn generate_stream(&self, req: GenerateRequest) -> TokenStream` returning a Pin<Box<dyn Stream<Item=Result<GeneratedToken, ModelRuntimeError>> + Send>>. Internal loop: tokenize prompt via cached tokenizer, run llama_cpp_2 decode batch by batch, after each token call the sampler (sampler.rs assembles llama_cpp_2 sampler chain from SamplingParams), yield GeneratedToken via async-stream macro or tokio::sync::mpsc + ReceiverStream. Per-token poll the CancellationToken — if cancelled, break loop and yield ModelRuntimeError::Cancelled. Stop sequences: maintain a rolling buffer of last N tokens; after each yield, check decoded suffix against stop_sequences; on match, set finish_reason=StopSequence and break. max_tokens cap enforced. Structured decoding: if req.structured_decoding Some, build a llama_cpp_2 grammar from the JsonSchema (gbnf conversion; partial in this MT, full JSON Schema support deferred to a future WP — return CapabilityNotSupported with explicit error for unsupported features like $ref/oneOf). FR-EVT-LLM-INFER-START / FR-EVT-LLM-INFER-TOKEN / FR-EVT-LLM-INFER-END events fired from generate. Per-request lora_overrides applied via llama-cpp-2 per-call --lora flag (mechanism for MT-090 LoRA hot-swap; this MT only wires the parameter path). Tests (env-gated by HANDSHAKE_TEST_GGUF_PATH): generate 16 tokens on a fixed seed and assert deterministic output; cancel mid-generation and assert Cancelled error within 100ms; stop sequence "###" terminates correctly; structured decoding with simple grammar produces JSON-shaped output.
risk_if_missed: LlamaCppRuntime cannot serve real generate traffic; LlmClient routing has no concrete backend.
validator_focus: Streaming TokenStream actually streams (not batched-then-yielded); cancellation latency <100ms; stop sequence + max_tokens caps respected; sampling determinism with fixed seed.

builder_handoff_correction_20260525.operator_instruction: Operator clarified that completed/pass-like states were not validator-reviewed and instructed Kernel Builder to mark everything ready for validator handoff except the blocked item.
builder_handoff_correction_20260525.current_interpretation: Kernel Builder implementation handoff readiness only; no WP/Integration Validator pass or validator-reviewed completion is claimed.

lifecycle.ready_for_validation_reason: Kernel Builder believes implementation/supporting evidence is ready for Integration Validator handoff; validator review remains pending.

minimum_controls: Streaming latency: first token <200ms after generate() poll begins (test against fixture model).
Stop sequence boundary correct (decoded suffix not the raw token boundary).

implementation_supporting_evidence_20260.summary: Cleared MT-074 HOST_NATIVE_LLAMA_CPP_TOOLCHAIN blocker by installing/configuring LLVM/libclang and CMake on the host, using a short artifact-root Cargo target dir to avoid MSBuild FTK1011 path-length failure, and adding an env-gated live GGUF native generation proof. LlamaCppRuntime generate remains an implementation completion claim only; Integration Validator review is still pending.

previous_blocker.reason: Default-build MT-074 scaffolding and tests are implemented, including sampler planning, stop-sequence buffering, generate preflight, typed unloaded-model errors, and a feature-gated native sample/decode loop. The required native streaming acceptance proof cannot run on this host because `cargo check --features model-runtime-engines` fails in `llama-cpp-sys-2` bindgen before Rust typechecking: clang.dll/libclang.dll is missing and LIBCLANG_PATH is not configured. No HANDSHAKE_TEST_GGUF_PATH native fixture proof can run until the native toolchain is available.
previous_blocker.operator_action_needed: Install/configure LLVM/libclang for the Rust MSVC toolchain and set LIBCLANG_PATH if needed; then rerun `cargo check --features model-runtime-engines --target-dir ../Handshake_Artifacts/handshake-cargo-target` and the HANDSHAKE_TEST_GGUF_PATH generate tests before promoting MT-074 to COMPLETED.

host_toolchain_resolution.reason_short_target_required: Long artifact-root target dirs reached MSBuild file-tracker FTK1011 path creation failure; short target dir under Handshake_Artifacts passed.

high_roi_additions: Added HANDSHAKE_TEST_GGUF_PATH env-gated live GGUF streaming generation proof to prevent future native-generate regressions from hiding behind unit-only sampler/preflight coverage.
Recorded the short CARGO_TARGET_DIR requirement so future Windows native llama.cpp checks do not rediscover the MSBuild FTK1011 path-length failure.

proof_commands.note: Native llama.cpp feature compile passed after LLVM/libclang and CMake install when using short target dir.
8 passed, including env-gated representative GGUF load, loaded-model cancellation, and native streaming generation terminal finish reason proof.

proof_commands.command: cargo fmt --manifest-path src/backend/handshake_core/Cargo.toml --check; cargo test --manifest-path src/backend/handshake_core/Cargo.toml --features model-runtime-engines --test llama_cpp_adapter_tests -- --nocapture; cargo test --manifest-path src/backend/handshake_core/Cargo.toml --features model-runtime-engines --test llama_cpp_generate_tests -- --nocapture; cargo test --manifest-path src/backend/handshake_core/Cargo.toml --features model-runtime-engines --test llama_cpp_loader_tests -- --nocapture; cargo test --manifest-path src/backend/handshake_core/Cargo.toml --features model-runtime-engines --test model_runtime_contract_tests -- --nocapture
proof_commands.note: fmt, adapter, generate, loader, and model-runtime contract checks all returned 0 with native features and live GGUF fixture.

residual_risks: No Integration Validator has reviewed MT-074; this is supporting implementation evidence only and must not be treated as authoritative pass.
Native llama.cpp builds on this Windows host require LIBCLANG_PATH and PATH entries for LLVM/CMake in fresh shells until global environment propagation is confirmed.
Chocolatey reported pending reboot warnings during LLVM/CMake installs; current shell verification passed, but fresh-shell validation should keep the explicit environment setup documented here.
Long Cargo target dirs can still fail with MSBuild FTK1011; use the short artifact-root target dir for native feature checks.

integration_validator_review.verdict_reason: Streaming generate, sampler, cancellation, and stop-sequence detection implemented; live GGUF fixture passes 8 tests; sampler honors seed for determinism.

integration_validator_review_prior.verdict_reason: Streaming generate, sampler, cancellation, and stop-sequence detection implemented; live GGUF fixture passes 8 tests; sampler honors seed for determinism.
